user.title: Login to CNAIR eRovinieta Service

reauth_confirm.description: The password for account **{username}** has expired or changed. Please enter the new password.

error.authentication_failed: Authentication failed. Please check your credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to eRovinieta service. Please check your internet connection.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check logs for details.
error.invalid_update_interval: Update interval must be between 300 and 86400 seconds.
Update interval must be between 300 and 86400 seconds.

error.license_already_used: This license key has already been used on another installation.
error.license_fingerprint_mismatch: This license key is bound to a different installation.
error.license_network_error: Cannot connect to the license server. Check your internet connection.
error.license_server_error: License server error. Please try again later.
